'''sayodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oad|oad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oad|oad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sayodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || sæyedheth || sæyedhej || sæyedhesh || sæyedhe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || sayoyodhoth || sayoyodhoj || sayoyodhosh || sayoyodho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || sayodhoth || sayodhoj || sayodhosh || sayodho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || sayofdhofth || sayofdhofj || sayofdhofsh || sayofdhof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sayodhotho || sayodhojo || sayodhosho || sayodhoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || sayodhoth || sayodhoj || sayodhosh || sayodho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sayodhothol || sayodhojol || sayodhoshol || sayodhokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sayodhoothotho || sayodhoojojo || sayodhooshosho || sayodhooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || sayodhothon || sayodhojon || sayodhoshon || sayodhokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sayodhothooro || sayodhojooro || sayodhoshooro || sayodhokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
